creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

latest stable unifi controller has been bumped to 5.3.11:
https://community.ubnt.com/t5/UniFi-Updates-Blog/UniFi-5-3-11-Stable-has-been-released/ba-p/1791878

Any chance to get this in ports anytime soon?

Also, since last few versions I can't upgrade AP firmware through controller.

Thank you in advance.
